pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the spirit within my breast. Everything is lost... the betrayal, the silence of the halls, the hollow ache where my heart once beat for him. It feels as though the very shadows are reaching for me, whispering that there is no path forward, only the cold, dark peace of the void. I am so very tired of breathing this heavy air.
